reviews.review_description:
Connor sets the mood from the very first seconds: cool lighting, controlled rhythms, a dark touch reminiscent of a thriller. The gameplay is fluid. You aim, dodge, and then move on with that stylish slow-motion feeling, just like in a movie. MoonShine Games has clearly focused on efficiency: no complicated menus or overly long tutorials; you get right into the action.
Even the soundtrack encourages you to pull the trigger.
You must navigate more than 20 action-packed chapters reminiscent of iconic scenes from films like James Bond or The Matrix.
In a very limited time, you must eliminate all enemies and find the level's exit. Other cinematic rail shooter scenes diversify the gameplay.
Connor is a must-have for fans of pure action and single-player performance

reviews.review_title: Alot of fun, until un-lucky mission #13
reviews.review_description:
It feels a bit rough but so far I'm having alot of fun with it (only done 1 mission so far). After the mission your able to play a VR shooter inside this VR shooter 🤯 and i spent a good 45min just playing this side mode 😆 unless it totally bombs later in the game I'd definitely recommend this game to friends

7 missions in now, really liked the car chase scene 😀 I did experience a bug in second warehouse level where all the objects disappear but it fixed itself so not a big issue. Also some areas bullets should be able to pass through for some reason have an invisible wall. But overall still really enjoying it.

Ran into the disappearing objects bug again on Harbour mission 1. Harbour mission 2 theres an area where you have to jump from one wood ledge to another, if you fall i saw no way to get back up causing you to be stuck. It was here I realized theres no restart option? So I have to sit and wait for the timer to retry. Please fix this 🙏 still enjoying the game 😀

13 missions in and I'm still impressed with this game the amount of mission variety here keeps you from getting board just as much as the fast paced action!

Ok unfortunately this game is broken on mission 13, I've played it 20x and never unlocks the finish. Around play 15 was when I spotted my first invisible enemy. I'm guessing its one of these invisible guys I'm missing. Honestly on this mission you could just have the finish unlocked by default. Please fix this so I can return my review to 5 star 🙏🙏🙏

An  old school matrix style shooter that is surprisingly good fun, graphics are basic but really suit the style of this type of game.
Gun mechanics are very good, aiming the gun works well.
It is one of those hidden gems.
Definitely one to add to your collection.

This is quite good, graphic style suits the gameplay.
Less serious and more fun shooter… don’t have to worry about reloading.

Simple fun, run and gun gameplay.

Various stages in different locations.

Will update review when got further

This game sucks. Glitches constantly. The graphics are horrible the ha, replay sucks and they won't even let me refund it and I jus bought it played maybe ten mins tried to refund it and it won't allow it . It's crap the game is crap and now I'm out 20 bucks for this trash . I can't believe this has a 4.7 rating it's so terrible and if I were you I wouldn't waste my money or time on this crap. Thanx for ripping me off. I wish I could give it negative stars  I hate to even give it one star. Trash

A great little action title that lives precisely because of its style, the fast, poppy music and the hard-hitting action. I really like it and the 20+ mini-missions are really fun. The game is both fast and of course slow thanks to the slow motion function, which makes it more intense.
There is only one point of criticism: the frame rate is not clean and therefore the image unfortunately lags behind. I hope this can be improved for Quest 3.

This is a great concept, a hella fun with cool environments and graphical style. More insights after a decent playthrough.

Get your 25 off here:
linkye dot net/2B2N

reviews.review_title: Great game with some glitches to fix
reviews.review_description: I love almost everything about this game - ambiance, setting, humor, action... Unfortunatelly there are some glitches that can impact the gameplay. So for now 4 stars

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, pop over to the discord and let me know your glitches you found and we can work to fix them :) maybe get it up to 5 star https://discord.gg/rtu8smcq

reviews.review_title: I'm at a loss for words.
reviews.review_description: It's that cool I can't explain it
